metrics.label: Shot Volume
metrics.description: How often the player gets shots off, ranked against positional peers.
metrics.confidence_notes: Can be inflated by team dominance or a role that funnels shots to one player.

metrics.label: xG Volume
metrics.description: How much expected goal threat the player generates per 90 minutes.
metrics.confidence_notes: Can move quickly in small samples or for players with unusual shot selection.

metrics.label: Shot Quality
metrics.description: The average quality of the player's shots, ranked against positional peers.
metrics.confidence_notes: Best read alongside shot volume because selective shooters can look cleaner.

metrics.label: Non-Penalty Goals
metrics.description: Open-play and non-penalty scoring output per 90 minutes.
metrics.confidence_notes: Finishing output is noisy and should be checked against xG and shot quality.

metrics.label: Shot Conversion
metrics.description: How efficiently the player turns shots into goals.
metrics.confidence_notes: Highly sensitive to shot sample size and finishing variance.

metrics.label: Shot Generation
metrics.description: Know Ball's role-adjusted shot threat dimension.
metrics.confidence_notes: Depends on the underlying position rating config and rated minutes.

metrics.label: Chance Creation
metrics.description: Know Ball's role-adjusted creative output dimension.
metrics.confidence_notes: Team style and set-piece role can materially affect this signal.

metrics.label: xA Volume
metrics.confidence_notes: Can be suppressed by poor teammate finishing or inflated by set-piece usage.

metrics.label: Key Pass Volume
metrics.description: Passes leading directly to shots per 90 minutes.
metrics.confidence_notes: Can favor high-tempo teams and players in set-piece roles.

metrics.label: Carrying
metrics.description: Know Ball's role-adjusted ball carrying dimension.
metrics.confidence_notes: Should be checked with possession loss and role context.

metrics.label: Dribble Volume
metrics.description: Successful dribbles per 90 minutes, ranked against positional peers.
metrics.confidence_notes: Needs success-rate context because raw volume can include inefficient attempts.

metrics.label: Dribble Success
metrics.description: How often the player beats opponents when attempting dribbles.
metrics.confidence_notes: Can be inflated by selective dribbling or low attempt volume.

metrics.label: Aerial Volume
metrics.description: Aerial duels won per 90 minutes, ranked against positional peers.
metrics.confidence_notes: Volume is shaped by team directness and opponent behavior.

metrics.label: Aerial Win Rate
metrics.description: How efficiently the player wins aerial duels.
metrics.confidence_notes: Needs volume context because low-attempt players can rate well.

metrics.label: Ball Recoveries
metrics.description: How often the player recovers possession per 90 minutes.
metrics.confidence_notes: Team pressing structure can create or reduce recovery opportunities.

metrics.label: Possession Security
metrics.description: Possession loss rate, inverted so higher percentile means safer possession.
metrics.confidence_notes: Must be interpreted alongside how risky and valuable the player's role is.
